findings_added.summary: Writer 14b systemic quality cluster on p.136-140: (a) p.136 4-5 variable name typos (AEUNANT→AEURANT / AERLPRT→AERPRT / AERLPRC→AERPRC / Trtmnt→Trimet / TAETORD→TAEFORD) — same writer-family hallucination pattern as O-P1-23 batch 09 DSDTC + O-P1-34 batch 12 ec.xpt typos; (b) p.137 9-atom UNDER-EXTRACTION (8 TABLE_ROW spec rows AESTDTC..AEENTPT + 1 footnote NOTE entirely DROPPED — Region 1 of p.137 missed) — same R12 transition discipline failure as O-P1-28 batch 11 p.103; (c) p.137 page-shift bug (AEBODSYS item 2.d should be on p.138 top but writer placed it on p.137 a007) — same pattern as O-P1-35 batch 12 p.118/p.119; (d) p.138-140 verbatim drift cluster (item 4 punctuation `;→:` + item 4.d paraphrase + missing 'For example' SENTENCE on p.139 + item 8 TAEFORD vs PDF TAETORD + item 12 multi-variable name typos AELLT/AELLTCD/AEPTCD/AEHLT/AEHLTCD/AEHLGT/AEHLGTCD vs writer corruption AELLTD/AELHLTCD/AAELHLTD/AELGT/AEHLTGTCD). Caught via main-session pre-Rule-A PDF cross-check on all 5 pages. **Option E executor × p.136-140 full-batch rerun (72 atoms PDF-verified)** wholesale replaces 61-atom writer 14b output (+11 atoms net = +9 p.137 spec tail + +1 p.138 AEBODSYS + +1 p.139 'For example' + 0 net p.136/p.140 with verbatim corrections only). 4th successful Option E full-batch rerun precedent in P1 (after p.60 batch 06 + p.103 batch 11 + p.119 batch 12). Writer-family quality cluster: 14b R7 strict-match was OK (61=61, R14 holding) but R10 verbatim discipline FAIL across all 5 pages — distinct failure mode from R7 over-claim pattern (09b/11a).

Option E executor rerun produces TABLE_ROW + TABLE_HEADER inner-pipe style (`field1 | field2 | ...`) AND omits explicit `heading_level: null` + `sibling_index: null` null keys for non-HEADING atoms — vs standard executor 14a output uses outer-pipe (`| field1 | field2 | ... |`) + explicit null keys. Within-batch inconsistency 14a (52 outer-pipe + 95 null-key) vs 14b post-rerun (24 inner-pipe + 67 omitted-key) caught by Rule A slot #23 designer F-1 MEDIUM + OBS-2. **Option H bulk-fix** applied: 24 atoms outer-pipe wrap + 67 atoms add null keys + canonical key reorder. Within-batch consistency restored. Cross-batch O-P1-26 inconsistency (outer-pipe vs prior batches' mixed style) still deferred to v1.3 reconciler decision. Root cause: Option E rerun prompt did not explicitly enforce outer-pipe convention or null-key requirement; future Option E rerun prompts should include explicit pipe-format + null-key examples in JSONL schema section.
